reviews.review_description:
Runs flawless. Good animations. 
Nice sceneries. Highly replayable . 
Definitely recommend
More maps please !

Please add the option to use right controller to turn. Some of us don't have the mobility and this is an awesome game . 

I highly recommend this game. It's fire

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing review and recommendation! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the gameplay, animations, scenery, and replayability.

Your feedback is incredibly important to us. In fact, we're already working on a new update, and your suggestions are exactly the kind of input that helps us improve the experience for everyone. We've taken note of your request for an option to turn using the right controller, and we completely understand how valuable accessibility features like this can be.

Thanks again for your support and for taking the time to share your thoughts. We can't wait to bring you more content, improvements, and yes more maps in future updates! 🔥🎮

reviews.review_description:
Zumbi Shooter Arcade Waves delivers a fast-paced and fun VR arcade experience. The gameplay is simple, responsive, and perfect for quick sessions. Technically remarkably accomplished.
The graphics, like the game, are literally explosive.
A solid choice for players looking for action and zombie shooting in VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the fast-paced gameplay and responsive mechanics. It’s great to hear the visuals and overall experience hit the mark for you. We truly appreciate your support!

reviews.review_title: A simple little game but very impressive
reviews.review_description: Hello, first of all, I want to congratulate you because the cinematic visual effect is exceptional and creates a highly immersive atmosphere. Technically, it's true that the monsters and other elements are not perfect, but their impressive number more than makes up for it, making the overall experience very convincing. The sound design is perfectly coherent with the whole, enhancing the immersion. The gameplay, which allows you to find weapons that are sometimes more powerful, sometimes less, adds real depth, not to mention the valuable assistance of our allies. What I particularly appreciate about your game is the atmosphere and cinematic rendering that immerse us in a captivating apocalyptic universe. And the price, which remains very affordable, is a real bonus! Congratulations, I look forward to seeing the upcoming updates!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this incredible review and for your kind words! We’re truly happy to hear that you enjoyed the cinematic atmosphere, visual effects, and immersive sound design of the game.
It means a lot to us that you appreciate the intensity created by the large number of enemies and the gameplay variety with weapons and allies. Creating a convincing apocalyptic experience was one of our main goals, so reading feedback like yours is extremely motivating for the whole team.
We’re also glad you feel the game offers good value at its price point. Thank you again for your support and encouragement.
We can’t wait to show you what’s coming in future updates!

reviews.review_description:
I’m giving this game 5 stars in advance, knowing it’s in Early Access and hoping the developers will improve it over time. My honest rating right now is 2 stars.

Right now, the only positives for me in the game are the nice low-poly graphics, the VFX, and the overall atmosphere of the game (it’s pleasant to be in).

But the gameplay is just terrible right now:
* The game is completely unintuitive; you simply don't understand what's going on around you—it's total chaos (details below).
* Shooting at bonus spheres often doesn’t work (too large a collision box on surrounding objects?).
* The balance of zombie numbers is odd—sometimes there are too many, sometimes none at all.
* The weapons are counterintuitive and don’t seem to work as they should. The weapon-switching process is also counterintuitive.
* The most annoying weapon is the grenade launcher — it has long delays, grenades often get stuck in the air and explode right in front of you, and shooting at bonus spheres with the grenade launcher doesn’t work.
* The feedback from shooted zombies is unclear and unintuitive — it takes a different number of shots to kill the same type of zombie, headshots sometimes work and sometimes don’t, and there’s no visual or audio confirmation (like a head flying off or even a sound).
* The voice-overs are repetitive and annoying — a cacophony of the same phrases.
* There are quite a few obvious bugs. For example, if a countdown starts and you take a time bonus, the countdown doesn’t stop, and this situation can repeat several times during a single round.
* You can’t lose; zombies don’t affect you at all, and you don’t have a health bar.
* The game does not have a pause function, and you cannot access the menu while playing.
* The game has no settings (you can't even turn down the volume within the game).

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you so much for taking the time to write such a detailed review — we truly appreciate both your support and your honesty.

We’re really glad you enjoyed the visual style, VFX, and overall atmosphere. Those are areas we’ve put a lot of care into.

Regarding the gameplay, your feedback is extremely valuable. The game is currently in Early Access precisely because many of the aspects you mentioned are still being worked on, including:

clarity of mechanics and onboarding
enemy balance
weapon behavior and feel
visual and audio feedback
bugs and technical issues

Some of the issues you pointed out (like the grenade launcher behavior, timer bugs, and missing pause/menu options) are already on our priority list and will be improved in upcoming updates.

Your point about the lack of challenge (no damage/health system) is especially important, and we’re actively exploring changes to make the experience more engaging and meaningful.

Thanks again for your support and for believing in the project with your initial rating — we hope to win you over with future updates!

reviews.review_description:
I'm not the biggest fan of zombi survival games, BUT this is great.  No need to survive (at least where I got to in the game) just lay lead into some Zombies.  The graphics were great for this fast paced game.  Nothing scary, really, just find a way with a lot of different weapons and unlimited ammo to lay waste to zombies.

Highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We're glad you enjoyed the game even if you're not usually a fan of zombie survival games. We aimed to create an accessible and fun experience focused on fast-paced action and a wide variety of weapons. Hope you keep having fun!

Thanks for the feedback! We really appreciate it. Multiplayer is one of our most requested features. While it's not currently on our short-term roadmap, it's something we'd love to explore in the long term. Thanks for playing and for sharing your suggestion! 🎮😊

reviews.review_description:
No reloading, no limit in ammo, no flying enemy bullet.
Just shoot them all before the Zombies take my money for unlocking new stages.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're glad you're enjoying the fast-paced action and simple gameplay mechanics. 😊 It's great to hear that the unlimited ammo and no-reload experience let you focus on what matters most: taking down zombies before they steal your hard-earned money and unlocking new stages. Thanks for playing and for sharing your feedback! 🧟‍♂️🎮🚀

reviews.review_description: To Devs,thank you so much for this masterpiece of a game with beautiful graphics and VFX,I love how the zombies swarm you when you least expect,you should add multiplayer though because it would bring a lot more players and more fun just to have chaos with your friends.thx for redding.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review and support! We’re really happy to hear you’re enjoying the graphics, VFX, and those intense zombie swarm moments 😄
Multiplayer is definitely something a lot of players have been asking for, and feedback like yours helps us understand what the community wants most. Having chaotic zombie fights with friends does sound awesome!
Thanks again for playing and for taking the time to share your thoughts with us!
